creator: rootrider@shellfront.org
text:
the mail/thunderbird build is failing for me when I disable the ffmpeg option. I also confirmed that this occurred when using the default options other than ffmpeg disabled. This is on FreeBSD 10.3 RELEASE, AMD64, and using ffmpeg-2.8.6_3,1 (latest from ports). I was able to build thunderbird prior to the version being bumped up to 45.x when ffmpeg was disabled, so the build fails started happening for me when going from 38.7.1 to 45.0

poudriere logs:
successful build, with ffmpeg enabled: http://fakelag.net/thunderbird-45.0_1-success.log
failed build, with ffmpeg disabled: http://fakelag.net/thunderbird-45.0_1-fail.log
